goal: In-browser preview of preserved static-export builds inside the planning-app project editor. Picked option (b) from the spec (dev-only HTML rewriter + filesystem-backed asset route) so existing preserved builds work without rebuild. Implementation: hardened /api/dev/forge-view to rewrite only attribute values that look like Next.js asset paths (avoids stomping on user-content links), srcset support, and a <base href> safety-net inject; forge-view now accepts species+version params alongside the legacy single gen so both 2-level (app-forge/v1/) and 3-level (escape-the-dungeon/<workflow>/v<N>/) on-disk layouts resolve. New GET /api/dev/projects/[id]/preserved enumerates available builds for a project; new PreservedBuildPanel.tsx UI renders a species/version picker + PreviewFrame iframe; ProjectEditor exposes it as a third canvas mode ("Preview") plus auto-routes the generation-selection branch through the same panel; InspectorPane "open in new tab" now points at forge-view instead of the broken public /playable URL.
